about.title: About Us
about.body: International Love Dating Club is a premium international matchmaking agency with three service centers in LA, SF, and Las Vegas, dedicated to matching every member with a real, suitable, and lasting partner.

items.title: Verified & Trustworthy
items.desc: Every member profile is strictly reviewed

items.title: Full-Journey Support
items.desc: Six professional teams have your back

items.name: Member Selection Team
items.desc: Rigorous background screening to ensure every member is verified and authentic.

items.name: Precision Matching Team
items.desc: In-depth interviews and partner-criteria analysis enable two-way curation and tight quality control.

items.name: Emotional Support Team
items.desc: Full-journey companionship through every milestone of your relationship.

items.name: Image & Confidence Team
items.desc: From wardrobe to presence, from etiquette to expression — your confidence, fully elevated.

items.name: Relationship Progression Team
items.desc: From meeting and engagement to visa and marriage registration — we help your bond translate into real life.

items.name: Marriage Enrichment Team
items.desc: Marriage is not the finish line but a new beginning — we walk with you into real intimate life.

about.title: About Us
about.subtitle: About International Love Dating Club
about.story1Body: Founded in 2019 and headquartered in Los Angeles, International Love Dating Club operates three service centers in Los Angeles, San Francisco, and Las Vegas. As a premium international matchmaking agency, we have successfully served over 30,000+ members, helping them find true love with quality partners from the United States, United Kingdom, France, Canada, Australia and beyond.
about.story2Body: Every member is paired with a dedicated consultant for in-depth one-on-one communication. Our six professional teams cover member screening, precise matching, emotional coaching, image transformation, marriage facilitation, and family management — accompanying you throughout your journey.

oneOnOne.title: One-on-One Service
oneOnOne.subtitle: Senior Coach, Full-Journey Support
oneOnOne.intro: From sign-up to first hand-hold, every step is accompanied by a dedicated coach — guarding every introduction, every date, every relationship.
oneOnOne.processSubtitle: Six steps to begin your happiness journey

steps.title: Register & Complete Profile
steps.desc: Sign up quickly, upload photos, and fill out detailed profile and partner preferences.

steps.title: Profile Review & Verification
steps.desc: Our team verifies your identity and credentials to ensure authentic members.

steps.title: One-on-One Consultation
steps.desc: A dedicated consultant reaches out to deeply understand your values and preferences.

steps.title: Curated Match Recommendations
steps.desc: Based on compatibility and preferences, we recommend carefully selected matches.

steps.title: Online Communication
steps.desc: Start conversations with matches on our secure messaging platform.

steps.title: Offline Meetings & Bonding
steps.desc: We arrange in-person meetings to begin your real love story.

oneOnOne.coachTitle: A Dedicated Consultant Who Walks With You
oneOnOne.coachBody: Every member is paired with a dedicated consultant who deeply understands your values, lifestyle, and emotional needs. We don't just make introductions — we walk with you the entire way.

custom.title: Custom Matchmaking
custom.subtitle: Bespoke Plans For A Unique You
custom.intro: A matching plan tailored to your preferences, lifestyle, and life stage. Three tiers to meet every need.
custom.whyBody: High-net-worth individuals, overseas Chinese, and accomplished singles have more specific criteria and less time. Custom matchmaking is led by a senior director in person, with precise in-circle sourcing — so every meeting is worth your time.

party.title: Offline Parties
party.subtitle: Meet Outstanding People In Person
party.intro: Carefully screened guests, refined venues, and professional icebreaker hosting — our offline singles parties let you meet the most compatible people in the most comfortable setting.
party.photosSubtitle: Join our party community and meet someone special in real life

highlights.title: Carefully Screened Guests
highlights.desc: Every attendee passes profile and presentation review

highlights.title: Refined Venues
highlights.desc: Private luxury hotels, art galleries, and estates

highlights.title: Themed Experiences
highlights.desc: Afternoon tea, yacht parties, outdoor hikes, and more

weddingGallery.title: Wedding Gallery
weddingGallery.subtitle: Sweet Moments From First Meeting To Wedding
weddingGallery.intro: Every wedding is happiness we witness together; every moment is the best proof of love.
weddingGallery.quote: May your love, like these frozen moments, never fade.

successCases.title: Success Stories
successCases.subtitle: Real Couples, Real Happiness
successCases.intro: Real stories of couples who found love through International Love.

cases.title: CEO & Medical Scientist
cases.story: I came to the US in March 2022. Thanks to the professional team at International Love, I met my husband — a double postdoc from Stanford and Harvard. We got married in August that same year and now live in Phoenix, Arizona.

cases.title: Teacher & Professor
cases.story: With the matchmaker's help I met Jack, a university professor now living in Arizona. He flies home every week to be with me and our family.

cases.title: Beauty Influencer & Lawyer
cases.story: Through International Love I met David, a US attorney. We registered our marriage in China — real love is not limited by distance.

cases.title: Hotel Owner & Training Academy Owner
cases.story: I run a hotel back home. In 2021 I met my wife, who runs a coaching academy. We share the same lifestyle and love of fine wine. Engaged at 24, married the next year, now living a peaceful family life together.

cases.title: Sister-in-law & Lawyer
cases.story: I'm Wendy, from Shanghai. My sister-in-law introduced International Love. I got married this year and have received my green card.

cases.title: Sister-in-law & NYC Official
cases.story: I'm Susan, 63. Wendy's sister-in-law. I married a senior NYC official this year and received my green card — every day is beautiful.

cases.title: A New Chapter At 61
cases.story: I'm Rong, 61. With the help of International Love I met my husband, we married this year, and I now live happily in the US with my green card.

cases.title: Business Owner & Dental Consultant
cases.story: I'm Vera, 45, with a daughter. International Love introduced me to my 54-year-old husband, a dental consultant. A simple, beautiful wedding and a warm family life.

cases.title: Nurse & Building Supply Owner
cases.story: I was a nurse in China. Through International Love I met my husband, who owns a home building supply store. We married at Christmas and honeymooned in Canada.

cases.title: Singaporean Chinese & Professor
cases.story: I'm Jie, a Singaporean-Chinese media professional. With my sister's help I met my husband, a university professor. We met in Thailand and married in China last year, now awaiting a Canadian visa.

cases.title: Tutor & Engineer
cases.story: I'm Helen, a former Chinese teacher. Through International Love I met my engineer husband. We now live together in Canada.

cases.title: Realtor & Realty Firm Owner
cases.story: I'm Vicky from Hong Kong. Introduced by matchmaker Anna, I met my husband, who owns his own realty firm. We are married and living in Texas.

cases.title: Doctor & Air Force Medic
cases.story: I'm Min, a doctor. Through International Love I met my husband, a military medic. After 12 years single, I finally found my life companion.

cases.title: Realtor & Doctor
cases.story: Sisi met her doctor husband in the US Midwest, now happily married in Washington. Her daughter also joined her and is now in college.

cases.title: Dance Teacher & Teacher
cases.story: I'm Nina, a former dance teacher from Beijing. Through International Love I met my teacher husband. Life gets better every day — we now live on the PV Hills.
